title: Graphics and Multimedia Instructor
description: Instruction in Photoshop, FreeHand, and the Internet at Esbes Formació and Domènech Formació, creation of interactive educational tools and multimedia integration for Signos Particulares.
body:
Parallel to my early digital production projects, I worked as a **graphics and multimedia instructor**, sharing technical knowledge at a time when digital training was in its infancy and in high demand.

## Teaching at Training Centers

I taught courses in **Photoshop**, **FreeHand**, and **Internet** at **Esbes Formació** and **Domènech Formació**. The student body was very diverse, ranging from professionals looking to retrain to students new to the digital world.

## Educational Tools for Inclusion

One of the most significant tasks during this period was the creation of **interactive educational tools** for the *Municipal Institute for People with Disabilities*, adapting the design and interaction to specific accessibility needs.

## Multimedia Integration

I performed the **multimedia integration** with Macromedia Director for an interactive game for **Signos Particulares**, combining game, sound, and navigation elements into a cohesive experience.

## Technologies

-   Photoshop
-   FreeHand
-   Macromedia Director
-   Lingo
